steps.t: Spall can be found before Thorin's throne in the court of Erebor. You should hear Spall's reply to King Thorin Stonehelm.
Thorin stands before his throne in the court of Erebor. You should hear King Thorin's Stonehelm reply.
You should meet Spall the Lore-master in the Ironfold, which lies down the road that leads from the south-eastern gates of Dale.
You should talk to Lord Náin again, at his seat in Járnfast in the Iron Hills.
